name: Yassin Osman
title: Cyber Security Analyst
motivation: I built this website as a project for my Computer Science Ecosystems course. It serves as a job application process to showcase how I can develop secure, dynamic web applications
about: Hi, my name is Yassin! I am a student at Lancaster University Leipzig studying Computer Science. I enjoy learning how to build modern websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and exploring secure system infrastructures, version control, and shell automation scripting.

projects.name: Static Professional CV Portfolio
projects.description: The first project for this course. It is a clean, static website built using HTML and CSS to show my formal resume and background.

projects.name: Dynamic Web Application Ecosystem
projects.description: The second project for this course. It uses JavaScript to load data dynamically from a JSON file, features interactive animations, and includes a dark mode toggle button.
